description:
Overview:
Professional: Mini massager has a professional cushioning head, with a strong impact at 6000rpm, reaching 12mm deep muscles.
Long Battery Life: Hammer massager is 20h battery life, ≤45 decibels, low noise, will not affect other people.
Portable: Electric vibrating tool is small, light weight, and can be put into your pocket at hand, allowing massage and relaxation to truly blend in your life.
Easy to Grip: Fascia tool features unique shape design, shock absorption and cushioning, comfortable to hold and prevent hand soreness for long time use.
Mute: Body massager is designed with DC motor, the noise during operation is about the volume of a normal conversation.

Specification:
Product weight: Normal 110g enhanced 170g
Function: Massage to relax muscles
Power supply: USB
Control mode: Mechanical
Specification: Ordinary, enhanced
Packing size: 10.8*7.8*15.2

Package Content :
Plastic fitness equipment*1
